title: Ubiquiti UACC-G5-Dome-Ultra-FM-SB-B, flush mount for UVC-G5-DOME
category: Ubiquiti UACC-G5-Dome-Ultra-FM-SB-B, flush mount for UVC-G5-DOME
description: UACC-G5-Dome-Ultra-FM-SB-B in black is designed for mounting UVC-G5-DOME cameras into ceiling panels or walls. With a bracket depth of 88 mm, you can install your camera in a way that minimally disrupts the overall appearance of the interior. The glass dome is made of smoked glass for enhanced discretion
